title: Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu
tagline: Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Soundararajaperumal Temple is a temple dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu, located in Thadikombu, a village near Dindigul in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: The Soundararajaperumal Temple is a temple dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu, located in Thadikombu, a village near Dindigul in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built by Achyuta Deva Raya during the 16th century CE. Vishnu is worshipped as Soundararaja Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Soundaravalli. The temple is known for the Ranga Mandapam, which features rare life size sculptures. The temple has two inscriptions dating from the Nayak period.

topPlaces.name: Thadikombu
topPlaces.description: Thadicombu is a panchayat town in Dindigul district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It has a famous temple for Lord Vishnu Soundarraja perumal temple considered to be as sacred as the Kallazhagar Temple near Madurai.

topPlaces.name: Begumpur Mosque, Dindigul
topPlaces.description: The Begumpur Mosque, also called the Begumpur Big Mosque, is a mosque located on Madurai Road, Begampur in Dindigul, the administrative headquarters of the Dindigul district in state of Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Mughal style, the mosque was built by Haidar Ali.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu?
faq.a: The best time to visit Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu?
faq.a: Stays in Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Soundararajaperumal Temple, Thadikombu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thadikombu, Marambadi, Nandavanampatti, Dindigul Thalappakatti Restaurant, Sriramapuram.
